trigger: U06 panel-of-5 verify FAILed I1c/I16: the formal-rigor verifier was staffed with persona 'Formal Methods Professor', which is U06's own EXECUTOR persona — the validator flagged maker==checker even though the verification was blind and independent.
lesson: Staffing a verification-panel lens with the SAME persona label as the unit's executor trips the mechanical maker!=checker checks (I1c artifact reconciliation, I16 panel distinctness), regardless of genuine independence — the validator can only see the label, not the instance separation.
how_to_apply: When assigning panel verifier personas, exclude the unit's executor_persona from the panel roster up front; give each lens a DISTINCT non-executor roster persona (the lens/prompt carries the actual review angle, the persona label just needs to be a distinct roster member). Especially watch domain-expert executors (Formal Methods Professor, LLM Skills Architect) whose natural verification lens is the same persona.
evidence: units/U06/verify.json audit_notes (persona re-attribution); validate_run.py I1c/I16 FAIL lines pre-fix; DECISIONS #18. (since_wave corrected 3->4: admitted after wave-3 units U06/U07 executed, so it binds from the wave-4 brief frontier — forward-only per 02/P4, never retroactively into executed briefs.)
